name: Sericia — Abandoned Cart Rescue (1h delay)
notes: Fires when a sericia_orders row has status='pending' for > 1h. Fetches the items, sends a Resend email with a one-click 'Continue to checkout' link. Idempotent: marks cart_abandoned_notified=true so reruns skip.

nodes.name: List abandoned carts
nodes.notes: Supabase RPC: returns orders with status='pending', created_at < now-1h, cart_abandoned_notified=false. Requires an RPC defined in supabase/migrations.

nodes.name: Mark notified (idempotency)
nodes.notes: Requires adding columns `cart_abandoned_notified bool default false, cart_abandoned_notified_at timestamptz` to sericia_orders.
